**Extracting strike information**

I need to output JSON according to the custom schema. The document clearly announces an upcoming strike in Italy on Thursday, December 14, from 9 to 17. It’s clearly informational and indicates the strike will have repercussions. I’ve got to extract the relevant strike data: start date, end date, location type, location codes, and guaranteed times. The date doesn’t mention a year, but it’s implied to be 2023 based on the surrounding content. I'll format the dates as required.
